chunks.scheme_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
chunks.content:
Fund manager: Chirag Setalvad
Managing since: 2012-12-31T18:30:00.000Z
Education: Mr. Setalvad is a B. Sc and MBA from University of North Carolina.
Experience: Prior to joining HDFC AMC he has worked with New Vernon Advisory Services Ltd., HDFC AMC and ING Barings N.V.
Also manages: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth, HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth, HDFC Children's Fund Direct Plan

chunks.scheme_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
chunks.content:
Investment objective
The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Mid-Cap companies.

chunks.scheme_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
chunks.content:
Tax implications
If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
chunks.text:
Scheme: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth | Section: tax | Tax implications
If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
